suite.name: Registro Dados Invalidos

test.name: CT02 - Registro com nome muito curto deve falhar

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)
Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

SessionNotCreatedException: Message: session not created: DevToolsActivePort file doesn't exist; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#sessionnotcreatedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005dfd95+15395] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005dfdf0+153f0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7001178fd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70015e4a6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70015969a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff700153f99] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7001a7fd1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7001a7836] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff700163a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff700164953] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff700ba5511+5dab11] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff700b9f8fb+5d4efb] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff700bc3205+5f8805] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005fcc6e+3226e] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70060562c+3ac2c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005e9984+1ef84] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005e9b14+1f114] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005cca77+2077] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffd87357614+14] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffd88d626a1+21]
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.status: SessionNotCreatedException: Message: session not created: DevToolsActivePort file doesn't exist; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#sessionnotcreatedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005dfd95+15395] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005dfdf0+153f0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7001178fd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70015e4a6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70015969a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff700153f99] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7001a7fd1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7001a7836] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff700163a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff700164953] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff700ba5511+5dab11] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff700b9f8fb+5d4efb] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff700bc3205+5f8805] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005fcc6e+3226e] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70060562c+3ac2c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005e9984+1ef84] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005e9b14+1f114] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005cca77+2077] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffd87357614+14] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffd88d626a1+21]

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.arg: Nome deve ter pelo menos 3 caracteres

test.doc: Verifica que nome com menos de 3 caracteres não é aceito
test.status: SessionNotCreatedException: Message: session not created: DevToolsActivePort file doesn't exist; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#sessionnotcreatedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005dfd95+15395] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005dfdf0+153f0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7001178fd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70015e4a6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff70015969a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff700153f99] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7001a7fd1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7001a7836] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff700163a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff700164953] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff700ba5511+5dab11] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff700b9f8fb+5d4efb] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff700bc3205+5f8805] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005fcc6e+3226e] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff70060562c+3ac2c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005e9984+1ef84] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005e9b14+1f114] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7005cca77+2077] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffd87357614+14] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffd88d626a1+21]

suite.doc: Teste de registro de usuário - Dados Inválidos

errors.msg: Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)
